chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-76 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.606/2026. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.607/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2026 Mr. Shah Nawaz Jinjhi advocate for the petitioners a/w petitioners. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, A.A.G. = Petitioners Mst. Zoya d/o Santosh Kumar w/o Kamran and Kamran s/o Pirbho have filed this petition U/A 199 of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 seeking direction to the official respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioners at the behest of private respondents. Learned A.A.G Sindh who is present in some other matters, waives the notice and submits that protection is fundamental right of the petitioners and the same will be provided to them in accordance with law. In view of above, the instant petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide due protection to the petitioners in accordance with law as and when they approach the concerned police station and ensure that no harm is caused to them. Official respondents shall ensure that no FIR is lodged against the petitioner No.2 in respect of the petitioner No.1 to her alleged abduction as apprehended by the petitioners. Copy of this order to communicate with concerned SSP for information and compliance. The instant petition is disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE “Faisal”
